inputs.shares_source: 579,652,432 common shares issued and outstanding at May 31, 2026 (10-Q Q3 FY2026)
inputs.fcf_source: Legacy mining and hosting owner cash negligible at current share count; FY2025 cash used in operating activities $4.1M on pre-treasury share base (10-K FY2025). Lawrence operating path excludes ETH fair-value marks and ATM-funded purchases.
inputs.revenue_fy2025_source: Total revenue $6.095M FY2025 (10-K FY2025 segment table)
inputs.revenue_9mo_source: Total revenue $59.870M nine months ended May 31, 2026, including $56.924M staking and validation (10-Q Q3 FY2026)
inputs.eth_fv_source: 5,416,945 ETH at fair value $10,855,537 thousand at May 31, 2026 (10-Q Q3 FY2026 digital asset table)
inputs.equity_source: Stockholders equity $11,599,577 thousand at May 31, 2026 (10-Q Q3 FY2026)
inputs.cash_source: Cash and cash equivalents $340,289 thousand at May 31, 2026 (10-Q Q3 FY2026)
inputs.ocf_9mo_source: Net cash used in operating activities $(287,592) thousand nine months ended May 31, 2026 (10-Q Q3 FY2026 cash flow statement)
inputs.unrealized_loss_source: Unrealized loss on digital assets held $9,038,538 thousand nine months ended May 31, 2026 (10-Q Q3 FY2026)
inputs.normalization_note: FY2025 net income $348.6M and nine-month FY2026 net loss $9.1B are dominated by crypto fair-value marks per ASU 2023-08. Lawrence operating path uses legacy mining and staking cash economics; look-through ETH payoff is modeled in yield-curve scenarios and nav_overlay.

marvin_floor.notes: ETH fair value $10.856B divided by 579.7M shares at May 31, 2026; filings only, before preferred and warrant claims

blended_best.notes: Stockholders equity per share at May 31, 2026; no approved third-party blend

component_valuation.coverage_statement: Every currently identified material claim is valued once: ETH treasury look-through, trajectory net of dilution, staking annuity, and senior-claim reserve. Lawrence yield-curve payoff remains the stance-gate IRR bridge.

components.label: ETH treasury fair value per share (May 31, 2026)

valuation.evidence: $10.856B ETH fair value divided by 579,652,432 shares at May 31, 2026 (10-Q Q3 FY2026 digital asset table). Low case applies ~40% ETH mark haircut from May marks.
valuation.assumption_summary: Look-through ETH per diluted common share before trajectory and operating overlays. Proof in calculation_proof.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to GAAP CryptoAssetFairValue and share count on each filing refresh.
valuation.falsifier: ETH fair value per share falls below the low case after sustained spot decline and further dilution.

source.locator: CryptoAssetFairValue EthereumMember; $10,855,537 thousand at May 31, 2026
Cover page; 579,652,432 common shares outstanding May 31, 2026

assumptions.label: ETH fair value adjustment from May 2026 marks
assumptions.rationale: Low applies ~40% ETH mark haircut from May marks; base uses filing fair value; high modest premium.

components.label: Seven-year ETH price path net of ATM dilution

valuation.evidence: Base aligns with scenarios.base.sotp_build eth_growth_net_dilution (+$4.5/sh): 8% ETH CAGR for 7 years offset by 10% cumulative ATM dilution [Assumption]. Bear embeds dilution exceeding token appreciation.
valuation.assumption_summary: Incremental per-share value from ETH beta net of issuance, not double-counted with static look-through. Proof in calculation_proof.
valuation.cross_check: Range must reconcile to filing ETH purchases, share issuance, and live spot before IC approval.
valuation.falsifier: ATM issuance dilutes ETH per share faster than token price rises for two consecutive quarters.

source.locator: Cover page; 579,652,432 common shares outstanding May 31, 2026

assumptions.label: Probability ETH trajectory net of dilution delivers incremental value
assumptions.rationale: Probability embedded in incremental value range; base aligns with 8% ETH CAGR net 10% dilution over seven years.

assumptions.label: Seven-year incremental ETH value net of ATM dilution
assumptions.rationale: Incremental to static May look-through; bear dilution dominates, bull ETH re-rating with limited issuance.

assumptions.label: Remaining owner-funded deployment cost
assumptions.rationale: Further ATM cost captured inside dilution assumptions.

valuation.evidence: Nine-month FY2026 staking and validation revenue $56.924M on 579.7M shares; modest margin capitalized at 10 times [Assumption] in base payoff build.
valuation.assumption_summary: Small operating annuity from staking yield; legacy mining immaterial. Proof in calculation_proof.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to revenue segment table and corporate burn before promoting to base IRR.
valuation.falsifier: Staking yield falls below corporate G&A drag for two reporting periods.

source.locator: Segment revenue; staking and validation $56,924 thousand nine months ended May 31, 2026
Cover page; 579,652,432 common shares outstanding May 31, 2026

assumptions.label: Staking revenue to owner cash conversion
assumptions.rationale: Direct-cost margin on staking yield; corporate G&A excluded from this annuity.

assumptions.label: Owner-cash capitalization multiple
assumptions.rationale: Small operating annuity capitalized at modest multiple.

components.label: Warrants, deferred tax, and preferred-claim reserve

valuation.evidence: Warrant liability $2.1M and deferred tax liability $92.3M at May 31, 2026 (10-Q Q3 FY2026); BMNP preferred stock claims not fully modeled [HUMAN REVIEW].
valuation.assumption_summary: Reserve for senior claims and tax on unrealized crypto gains; base zero pending preferred waterfall. Proof in calculation_proof.
valuation.cross_check: Update when preferred conversion terms and ATM pace clarify dilution stack.
valuation.falsifier: Preferred or warrant conversion materially reduces common look-through below the low case.

source.locator: Warrant liability $2,100 thousand at May 31, 2026
Deferred tax liability $92,300 thousand at May 31, 2026
Cover page; 579,652,432 common shares outstanding May 31, 2026

assumptions.label: BMNP preferred stock look-through claim
assumptions.rationale: Preferred waterfall not fully modeled [HUMAN REVIEW]; reserve application varies by case.

assumptions.label: Fraction of filing senior claims applied to common look-through
assumptions.rationale: Base zero pending preferred waterfall clarity; low applies warrants, deferred tax, and preferred stress.

economic_value.accounting_reference: ETH marked to fair value under ASU 2023-08 on the balance sheet (~$18.76/sh at May 31, 2026); GAAP net income is mark-dominated ($9.04B unrealized loss nine months FY2026) and not used for Lawrence owner cash.

economic_claim.description: One diluted common share of Bitmine Immersion Technologies, including look-through ETH treasury at fair value, seven-year ETH trajectory net of ATM dilution, capitalized staking yield, and reserves for warrants, deferred tax, and preferred claims.
economic_claim.unit_source: 579,652,432 common shares issued and outstanding at May 31, 2026 (10-Q Q3 FY2026 cover page)
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: No operating enterprise debt at scale; equity equals digital assets at fair value plus cash less warrant, deferred tax, and preferred claims. ETH trajectory and staking are incremental to static look-through; G&A burn is reflected in Lawrence operating segments, not double-counted here.

component_groups.label: ETH treasury fair value per share (May 31, 2026)
component_groups.economic_claim: ETH treasury fair value per share (May 31, 2026)
component_groups.valuation_basis: Fair-value ETH stack divided by diluted common shares.
component_groups.adjustments: Low case applies ETH mark haircut; high case modest premium to May marks.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key eth_look_through_today; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

component_groups.label: Seven-year ETH price path net of ATM dilution
component_groups.economic_claim: Seven-year ETH price path net of ATM dilution
component_groups.valuation_basis: Risked incremental ETH per share from price path net of issuance.
component_groups.adjustments: Probability, timing, and dilution pace are inside the range.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key eth_trajectory_net_dilution; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

risk_and_timing.probability_basis: Base assumes moderate ETH appreciation with partial dilution offset; bear assumes dilution dominates.
risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Seven-year Lawrence horizon aligned with yield-curve stance gate.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Further ATM issuance is the primary remaining owner-funded dilution risk.

component_groups.label: Staking and legacy operating cash (capitalized)
component_groups.valuation_basis: Capitalized staking and legacy operating margin net of direct costs.
component_groups.adjustments: Does not double-count ETH fair value; yield is incremental operating cash.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key staking_and_legacy_cash; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

component_groups.label: Warrants, deferred tax, and preferred-claim reserve
component_groups.economic_claim: Warrants, deferred tax, and preferred-claim reserve
component_groups.valuation_basis: Reserve for senior financing claims and tax on crypto marks.
component_groups.adjustments: Negative additive; preferred waterfall pending [HUMAN REVIEW].
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key warrants_tax_preferred_reserve; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

wisdom_applied: Klarman: separate static look-through from issuance-driven dilution; do not treat GAAP net income as owner cash.
Pabrai: partial dhando when the hard asset floor exists but equity per share is not bounded.
limitations: May 31, 2026 marks may lag live ETH spot at refresh date.
BMNP preferred stock and post-May ATM issuance not fully captured.
Component base (~$24.0) bridges to the seven-year dated payoff used for stance-gate IRR.

valuation_methodology.decision_rule: Use one complete component schedule (ETH look-through + trajectory + staking + reserves). Lawrence yield-curve payoff remains the stance-gate IRR bridge, not a second asset stack.

optionality_gate.notes: Price $15.69 trades below May 31 ETH fair value per share (~$18.76) and GAAP equity per share (~$20.02); dhando partial because ATM dilution and mark volatility remain unbounded.

lines.label: Ethereum fair value (May 31, 2026)
lines.source: $10.856B ETH fair value divided by 579.7M shares (10-Q Q3 FY2026)

lines.label: Bitcoin and other digital assets
lines.source: BTC and other crypto fair value lines in 10-Q Q3 FY2026 digital asset table

lines.label: Cash and equivalents
lines.source: $340.3M cash divided by shares (10-Q Q3 FY2026)

lines.label: Warrant liability and deferred tax (look-through drag)
lines.source: Warrant liability $2.1M and deferred tax liability $92.3M at May 31, 2026 (10-Q Q3 FY2026)

nav_overlay.notes: ETH marked to fair value under ASU 2023-08; preferred stock and future ATM issuance not fully captured in static look-through.

segments.label: Legacy BTC mining, hosting, and equipment
segments.evidence: FY2025 revenue $6.095M; company winding down proprietary self-mining per 10-K FY2025 strategy pivot

segments.label: Staking and validation revenue
segments.evidence: Nine-month FY2026 staking and validation revenue $56.924M on 579.7M shares (10-Q Q3 FY2026); [Assumption] on margin after direct costs only

segments.label: General and administrative and advisory
segments.evidence: Nine-month FY2026 general and administrative expense $335.662M (10-Q Q3 FY2026); Tom Lee executive chairman and strategic advisor warrants (DEF 14A, 10-K FY2025)

options.label: ETH treasury accumulation via ATM and private placements
options.base_terminal_rationale: Modeled via yield-curve look-through payoff on ETH per share, not separate terminal row
options.evidence: Purchased 3,518,278 ETH units nine months ended May 31, 2026; 579.7M shares outstanding vs 234.7M at Aug 31, 2025 (10-Q Q3 FY2026)

bear.notes: ETH price falls 40% from May 2026 marks; continued ATM dilution 12% per year; mNAV discount persists

base.notes: ETH +8% per year; net ETH per share flat after dilution; mNAV discount narrows modestly

lines.label: ETH fair value per share today
lines.math: $10.856B ETH fair value divided by 579.7M shares at May 31, 2026 (10-Q Q3 FY2026)

lines.label: ETH price growth net of share dilution
lines.math: 8% ETH CAGR for 7 years offset by 10% cumulative dilution from ATM [Assumption]

lines.label: Staking and legacy operating cash
lines.math: Modest staking margin capitalized at 10 times [Assumption]

sotp_build.notes: Look-through ETH path; not GAAP net income

bull.notes: ETH cycle re-rating; staking scale; mNAV premium to look-through; limited further dilution

btc_overlay.disclaimer: Context only. ETH treasury metrics inform stance and overlays; they do not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion to base case requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

indicators.label: Market cap to ETH fair value (x)
indicators.source: Price $15.69 times 579.7M shares divided by $10.856B ETH fair value at May 31, 2026

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: ETH marked to fair value under ASU 2023-08; $10.856B at May 31, 2026 (10-Q Q3 FY2026)

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / dormant asset?
option_scan.evidence: 5.42M ETH treasury accumulated since Q3 calendar 2025 pivot (10-K FY2025; 10-Q Q3 FY2026)

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: Legacy self-mining and hosting wound down; G&A $335.7M nine months FY2026 (10-Q Q3 FY2026)

option_scan.question: Backlog / contracted revenue not in FCF?
option_scan.evidence: Staking revenue recognized currently; no material backlog disclosed

option_scan.question: Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: Equity method investments in digital asset companies; change in fair value $(6.8)M nine months FY2026 (10-Q Q3 FY2026)

option_scan.question: Transitory distribution / legal recovery?
option_scan.evidence: No dated legal recovery in base case

option_scan.question: Embedded product option in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: Staking yield on treasury ETH flows through revenue line (10-Q Q3 FY2026)

stance.rationale: Base 6.3% per year over seven years is below the ~15% accumulate hurdle despite partial ETH floor

catalyst_paths.impact: ETH +8% per year; net ETH per share flat after dilution; mNAV discount narrows modestly
ETH price falls 40% from May 2026 marks; continued ATM dilution 12% per year; mNAV discount persists

total_return_panel.error: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.
total_return_panel.return_contract: split-adjusted close excluding dividends; event amounts normalized for later splits; cash reinvested at ex-date close; pre-tax nominal

coverage.note: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.

component_valuation_results.decision_rule: Use the complete low/base/high component schedule. Embedded components are estimated but not added twice.

failure_modes: gross asset value mistaken for shareholder value

remote options treated as contracted cash
valuation_method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

economic_ownership_map.scenario_assumptions: Incremental per-share value from ETH beta net of issuance, not double-counted with static look-through. Proof in calculation_proof.

probability_and_timing.timing_basis: Seven-year Lawrence horizon aligned with yield-curve stance gate.
probability_and_timing.probability_basis: Base assumes moderate ETH appreciation with partial dilution offset; bear assumes dilution dominates.
probability_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Further ATM issuance is the primary remaining owner-funded dilution risk.

economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Probability, timing, and dilution pace are inside the range.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: ATM issuance dilutes ETH per share faster than token price rises for two consecutive quarters.

source_lineage.locator: Segment revenue; staking and validation $56,924 thousand nine months ended May 31, 2026
Cover page; 579,652,432 common shares outstanding May 31, 2026

economic_ownership_map.evidence: Nine-month FY2026 staking and validation revenue $56.924M on 579.7M shares; modest margin capitalized at 10 times [Assumption] in base payoff build.
economic_ownership_map.scenario_assumptions: Small operating annuity from staking yield; legacy mining immaterial. Proof in calculation_proof.
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Does not double-count ETH fair value; yield is incremental operating cash.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Staking yield falls below corporate G&A drag for two reporting periods.

low.label: BMNP preferred stock look-through claim

low.rationale: Base zero pending preferred waterfall clarity; low applies warrants, deferred tax, and preferred stress.

source_lineage.locator: Deferred tax liability $92,300 thousand at May 31, 2026
Cover page; 579,652,432 common shares outstanding May 31, 2026

economic_ownership_map.evidence: Warrant liability $2.1M and deferred tax liability $92.3M at May 31, 2026 (10-Q Q3 FY2026); BMNP preferred stock claims not fully modeled [HUMAN REVIEW].
economic_ownership_map.scenario_assumptions: Reserve for senior claims and tax on unrealized crypto gains; base zero pending preferred waterfall. Proof in calculation_proof.
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Negative additive; preferred waterfall pending [HUMAN REVIEW].
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Preferred or warrant conversion materially reduces common look-through below the low case.

method_route.label: Scarce assets, royalties, and optionality
failure_modes: gross asset value mistaken for shareholder value
operating cash flow and NAV counted twice
remote options treated as contracted cash
method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

top_value_drivers.label: Seven-year ETH price path net of ATM dilution
top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: Incremental per-share value from ETH beta net of issuance, not double-counted with static look-through. Proof in calculation_proof.

top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: Look-through ETH per diluted common share before trajectory and operating overlays. Proof in calculation_proof.

falsifiers: ETH fair value per share falls below the low case after sustained spot decline and further dilution.
ATM issuance dilutes ETH per share faster than token price rises for two consecutive quarters.
Staking yield falls below corporate G&A drag for two reporting periods.
Preferred or warrant conversion materially reduces common look-through below the low case.
required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

universal_valuation_contract.decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.

context_overlay.disclaimer: Context only. Tailwinds inform stance and overlay sizing; they do not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion to base case requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

insider_signal.disclaimer: Context only. Insider activity informs scenario confidence and stance discussion; it does not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

scenario_confidence.note: Scenario weights are qualitative confidence only; Lawrence base IRR unchanged.

top_sells.insider: Innovative Digital Investors Emerging Technology LP

lens_consensus.disclaimer: Advisory lens blend only. Does not replace Lawrence total-synthesis stance gate without [HUMAN REVIEW].

component_review_queue.decision_rule: Each assigned rater records accept, challenge, or reject with a proposed range and evidence. The aggregator may not silently average disputed ranges.

items.label: ETH treasury fair value per share (May 31, 2026)
mandatory_checks: Is the valuation method appropriate for this economic claim?
Is the security's ownership claim and economic-unit denominator reconciled correctly?
Does the evidence support the low/base/high range and its timing?
Are comparable assets truly like-for-like after production, contract, location, capital, ownership, and realization adjustments?
For an option, are success probability, time to realization, and remaining owner-funded capital explicit?
Is the component additive, or already embedded in another component?
What observation would move the base estimate materially?
